title: Delicate British Chicken Wings Afternoon Tea Sandwich
description: A malty and springy satvik-friendly British dish featuring chicken wings, tadka, and afternoon tea elements, perfect for a date night, served on a tagliere.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together malt vinegar, ghee, tadka spice mix, salt, and chopped spring onions.
Add the chicken wings to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the marinated chicken wings on it.
Bake the chicken wings in the preheated oven for 25 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the whole wheat bread and prepare the dates by slicing them into thin pieces.
Once the chicken wings are done, let them cool for a few minutes before slicing them into smaller pieces.
Assemble the afternoon tea sandwiches by placing a few pieces of chicken on each toasted bread slice, topping with a date slice and serving on a tagliere.
